promoSystem.title: Promo, referral, and commission tools for a scalable marketplace
promoSystem.description: TubaTour is being structured with layered promotion codes, partner referrals, traveler incentives, featured placements, and protected automated commission tracking.
promoSystem.label: Revenue system foundation

levels.title: Admin promo codes
levels.description: Marketplace-wide offers for launch campaigns, destination pushes, or seasonal travel incentives.

levels.title: Partner referral codes
levels.description: Guides, drivers, hosts, and experience providers can be connected to trackable referral flows linked to their own conversion and commission performance.

levels.title: Traveler referral codes
levels.description: Returning travelers can be supported through referral mechanics designed for repeat bookings and marketplace growth.

levels.title: Campaign and service-specific codes
levels.description: Transfers, tours, hotels, and food experiences can each support campaign code structures aligned with service-level promotions and category marketing.

safeguards.title: Usage limits
safeguards.description: Controls for how many times a code can be used across travelers, partners, or campaigns.

safeguards.title: Expiration dates
safeguards.description: Time-based expiration planning to keep travel campaigns controlled and relevant.

safeguards.title: Owner tracking
safeguards.description: Every code structure is designed with traceable ownership, attribution, and audit visibility.

safeguards.title: Fraud prevention
safeguards.description: Suspicious activity checks, admin oversight, and protected commission rules remain part of the monetization design.

safeguards.title: Booking history tracking
safeguards.description: Booking and redemption history are being modeled for clearer reporting across travelers, partners, and campaigns.

safeguards.title: Commission protection
safeguards.description: Promo and referral systems are being designed to preserve fair partner economics and automated commission tracking.

promoSystem.note: Coupon validation, referrals, featured placements, and commission automation are being designed as first-class marketplace systems inside the platform architecture.

adminPreview.title: Admin tools for quality, trust, growth, and marketplace operations
adminPreview.description: TubaTour includes a dedicated admin control layer for approvals, content quality, commissions, featured placements, promotions, and platform oversight.
adminPreview.label: Admin control layer

items.description: Protect marketplace economics while deciding which partners or experiences deserve featured visibility.
items.label: Revenue operations

whatsappCta.title: Need help planning your Cabo Verde trip?
whatsappCta.description: Send us your travel date, island, group size, and what you want to experience. We'll help you choose the right tour, transfer, or local plan.

inquiry.title: Request Your Cape Verde Trip Plan
inquiry.description: Tell us your travel dates, preferred island, number of travelers, and what you want to book. TubaTour will help you organize transfers, tours, local experiences, and island support.

intro.title: Find the island experience that feels right for you
intro.description: Each island offers a different mood, pace, and perspective. TubaTour helps you compare them more clearly so you can choose with confidence.

cards.title: Santiago
cards.description: A strong choice for travelers who want history, music, local flavor, and a richer understanding of Cabo Verdean culture.

cards.title: Sal
cards.description: A bright and easy coastal destination for beach lovers, laid-back stays, and comfortable island time.

cards.title: Santo Antão
cards.description: A dramatic mountain island for travelers drawn to green valleys, village life, and memorable nature-led discovery.

intro.title: Browse bookable Cape Verde experiences and custom trip support
intro.description: Explore the tours and planning services travelers request most often through listings designed for availability, pricing visibility, traveler accounts, and booking-ready marketplace flows.

cards.title: Tarrafal Beach Day Trip
cards.description: A scenic full-day Santiago outing that combines coastline, local stops, and beach time in Tarrafal.

cards.title: Cidade Velha Historical Tour
cards.description: Walk through Cabo Verde's UNESCO World Heritage story with a local guide who can bring context to every stop.

cards.title: Praia City & Culture Tour
cards.description: Discover markets, viewpoints, neighborhoods, food, music, and everyday Cabo Verdean life with local guidance.

cards.title: Local Food Experience
cards.description: Taste everyday Cabo Verde through local dishes, neighborhood spots, and food-led conversations with context.

cards.title: Custom Island Travel Plan
cards.description: Tell us your dates, group, island, and travel style so TubaTour can shape a practical itinerary inside a structured planning and booking-ready workflow.

santiago.name: Santiago
santiago.title: Experiences shaped around Santiago's culture, history, and local rhythm
santiago.description: Santiago is best explored through guided discovery, heritage depth, and moments that bring you closer to music, daily life, and the character of the island.
santiago.emphasis: Recommended for culture, local tours, heritage routes, and city rhythm

island-tours.description: Guided routes through Santiago that connect key landmarks, city rhythm, and the island's layered identity in a more meaningful way.

cultural-experiences.description: The strongest fit for Santiago: heritage-led visits, local music, neighborhood stories, and moments that feel rooted in real island life.

airport-transfers.description: A strong fit for Santiago travelers who want a shorter guided introduction to Praia's viewpoints, neighborhoods, music, and local rhythm.

personalized-travel-planning.description: Useful for travelers who want to combine culture, history, and local encounters into a clearer Santiago itinerary.

sal.name: Sal
sal.title: Experiences designed for Sal's beach calm, easy movement, and coastal leisure
sal.description: Sal works best when travel feels simple, light, and beautifully paced. The most relevant experiences here focus on shoreline discovery, easy logistics, and relaxed planning.
sal.emphasis: Recommended for beach stays, island ease, sea air, and smooth transfers

island-tours.description: Easy island touring for travelers who want to take in Sal's coastline, light atmosphere, and signature seaside stops without overcomplicating the day.

cultural-experiences.description: A softer, lighter way to add local context to a beach-led stay, with just enough island character to enrich the trip.

airport-transfers.description: A lighter city-and-local-context style outing for travelers on Sal who want a little more than beach time without losing the relaxed pace.

personalized-travel-planning.description: Ideal for balancing beach time, simple outings, and the right level of support without losing the easygoing rhythm of Sal.

sao-vicente.name: São Vicente
sao-vicente.title: Experiences curated for São Vicente's creativity, music, and urban coastal character
sao-vicente.description: São Vicente feels strongest when the trip leans into local encounters, artistic atmosphere, and the island's expressive seaside culture.
sao-vicente.emphasis: Recommended for music, urban charm, local encounters, and curated stays

island-tours.description: A well-paced way to experience São Vicente beyond the obvious, blending seafront atmosphere, local landmarks, and the island's distinct personality.

cultural-experiences.description: The clearest match for São Vicente: music, creative energy, neighborhood life, and cultural encounters with real personality.

airport-transfers.description: An easy way to move through Mindelo with local guidance, neighborhood texture, and a clearer sense of the city's social energy.

personalized-travel-planning.description: Especially valuable for creating a more intentional São Vicente stay around music, dining, local rhythm, and curated recommendations.

santo-antao.name: Santo Antão
santo-antao.title: Experiences built around Santo Antão's trails, scenery, and dramatic natural depth
santo-antao.description: Santo Antão is at its best when the journey follows the landscape. The most relevant experiences here prioritize routes, viewpoints, fresh air, and well-planned movement through the island.
santo-antao.emphasis: Recommended for hiking, scenic routes, nature discovery, and route planning

island-tours.description: Scenic touring and guided discovery designed around valleys, trailheads, mountain roads, and the island's most memorable viewpoints.

cultural-experiences.description: A lighter complement to the landscape-focused journey, adding local context and human depth between outdoor routes.

airport-transfers.description: A softer culture-and-place option that gives nature-focused travelers more everyday context between scenic routes and trail plans.

personalized-travel-planning.description: Highly recommended for Santo Antão, where the right pacing, route choices, and overnight structure make a big difference.

boa-vista.name: Boa Vista
boa-vista.title: Experiences arranged for Boa Vista's quiet beaches, openness, and calm escape
boa-vista.description: Boa Vista is best approached with a lighter touch: simple logistics, beach-oriented support, and enough planning to keep the stay smooth without losing the sense of space.
boa-vista.emphasis: Recommended for calm beach stays, simple transfers, and easy planning

island-tours.description: Light island discovery for travelers who want to enjoy Boa Vista's openness, shorelines, and easy scenic movement.

cultural-experiences.description: A quieter cultural layer for travelers who want a little more context while keeping the trip relaxed and beach-led.

airport-transfers.description: A simple local outing that gives calm-stay travelers a little more connection to the island beyond the beach rhythm.

personalized-travel-planning.description: Useful for shaping a peaceful, easygoing stay without overplanning, especially for longer beach escapes.

fogo.name: Fogo
fogo.title: Experiences designed around Fogo's volcanic identity, character, and deeper exploration
fogo.description: Fogo stands out through uniqueness and depth. The most relevant experiences here favor guided discovery, special routes, and a more intentional understanding of the island's singular atmosphere.
fogo.emphasis: Recommended for guided discovery, volcanic landscapes, and deeper itineraries

island-tours.description: Guided discovery is especially important on Fogo, helping travelers move through volcanic scenery with more context, confidence, and perspective.

cultural-experiences.description: A strong complement to the island's dramatic landscape, adding local depth, lived stories, and cultural perspective to the journey.

airport-transfers.description: A guided cultural layer that helps Fogo travelers connect the dramatic landscape with towns, viewpoints, and lived local texture.

personalized-travel-planning.description: Highly relevant for Fogo, where a more tailored itinerary can bring together discovery, pacing, and the island's distinctive highlights.

maio.name: Maio
maio.title: Experiences arranged for Maio's quiet beaches, soft pace, and easy island escape
maio.description: Maio is best suited to travelers looking for peace, open shoreline, and simple island movement. The marketplace is expanding coverage here with calm stay support, light planning, and beach-oriented discovery.
maio.emphasis: Recommended for quiet beach stays, low-key discovery, and easy island planning

island-tours.description: A lighter island outing built around Maio's openness, shoreline atmosphere, and simple scenic movement.

cultural-experiences.description: A soft local layer for travelers who want a little more context while keeping the stay calm and beach-led.

airport-transfers.description: Helpful for keeping arrivals, departures, and beach-stay coordination simple as Maio marketplace coverage grows.

personalized-travel-planning.description: Useful for shaping a relaxed Maio stay with just the right amount of structure and local support.

sao-nicolau.name: São Nicolau
sao-nicolau.title: Experiences curated for São Nicolau's mountain scenery, villages, and slower discovery
sao-nicolau.description: São Nicolau suits travelers who want scenic depth, village atmosphere, and a more grounded island rhythm. TubaTour is extending coverage here through route planning, local context, and thoughtful service discovery.
sao-nicolau.emphasis: Recommended for scenic routes, village character, and slower island discovery

island-tours.description: A scenic discovery layer designed around mountain roads, village stops, and São Nicolau's quieter island character.

cultural-experiences.description: A strong complement to the landscape, adding everyday local encounters and village-based cultural perspective.

airport-transfers.description: Structured transfer support that helps keep a multi-stop or slower-paced São Nicolau itinerary feeling easy to manage.

personalized-travel-planning.description: Especially useful for connecting scenic priorities, route pacing, and overnight planning on São Nicolau.

brava.name: Brava
brava.title: Experiences designed for Brava's intimate scale, gardens, and quiet local charm
brava.description: Brava fits travelers who want a smaller-island feel, local texture, and gentle pacing. The marketplace is extending coverage here with curated support for quiet stays, local discovery, and tailored planning.
brava.emphasis: Recommended for gentle discovery, local charm, and smaller-island travel support

island-tours.description: A softer discovery format that fits Brava's scale, viewpoints, and intimate island atmosphere.

cultural-experiences.description: Especially well matched to Brava, where local stories, slower rhythms, and everyday island life shape the experience.

airport-transfers.description: Useful for coordinating arrivals and onward movement when Brava is part of a broader multi-island trip.

personalized-travel-planning.description: Valuable for travelers who want to fit Brava naturally into a tailored Cape Verde itinerary.

hero.title: A travel marketplace built to make Cabo Verde easier to book with confidence
hero.description: TubaTour is a multilingual tourism marketplace platform that helps visitors discover Cabo Verde through clear guidance, verified local partners, and a more personal sense of care from the very beginning.
highlights: Premium in feel, warm in tone

whoWeAre.title: Who we are
whoWeAre.description: TubaTour is a tourism marketplace brand focused on making Cabo Verde easier to understand, easier to book, and more beautifully presented online. We believe planning a trip should feel reassuring as well as inspiring.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.description: Our vision is to create a refined and welcoming gateway to Cabo Verde, where travelers move from curiosity to confidence through trusted partner profiles, structured booking flows, and thoughtful local experiences.

approach.title: Our approach
approach.description: We combine clarity, local sensitivity, and elegant simplicity. That means multilingual content, clean structure, partner-facing marketplace tools, and traveler touchpoints that help each booking feel guided rather than overwhelming.

whyTravelWithUs.title: Why travel with TubaTour
whyTravelWithUs.description: Because the journey begins long before arrival. TubaTour is designed to make that beginning feel smoother, more trustworthy, and more connected to the spirit of Cabo Verde itself through one marketplace foundation.

hero.title: Tell us what kind of Cabo Verde journey you have in mind
hero.description: Whether you already know the island you want or you are still exploring possibilities, TubaTour helps travelers and partners move into the next step with clarity, marketplace structure, and local understanding.
hero.trustMessage: Every request is handled through a platform foundation designed for booking clarity, partner coordination, and high-quality travel support.

whatsapp.title: Prefer to speak on WhatsApp?
whatsapp.description: Use TubaTour messaging channels for early booking questions, partner onboarding requests, or direct marketplace support.
whatsapp.phone: Official TubaTour business contact is handled through secure platform support channels

email.title: Would you rather write by email?
email.description: Share your travel plans, booking needs, or platform questions and the TubaTour team will continue the conversation with care.

form.title: Plan your Cabo Verde booking
form.description: Tell us your island, dates, group size, and the type of service you want so TubaTour can route your request into the right booking or partner workflow.
form.successDescription: Thank you for contacting TubaTour. We have received your details and will follow up as soon as possible.
form.errorMessage: We could not send your inquiry right now. Please try again in a moment or contact us by WhatsApp or email.
